common.secretPrompt: This information will not be uploaded to any server, only stored locally.
common.temperaturePrompt: Higher values produce more diverse output, lower values produce more deterministic output

bot.name: AI Bot
bot.notImplemented: This bot has not been implemented yet
bot.notAvailable: This bot is not available: {botName}. Please configure in settings.
bot.waiting: {botName} is waiting for the previous response to complete...
bot.pastRoundsPrompt: Number of past conversation rounds to keep for context

chat.systemPromptPrompt: Set the system prompt for the conversation

error.solveChallenge: Please visit this link to solve the verification challenge:

settings.title: Settings
settings.secretPrompt: This information will not be uploaded to any server, only stored locally.

openaiApi.temperaturePrompt: Higher values produce more diverse output, lower values produce more deterministic output

geminiApi.topKPrompt: Controls the number of tokens the model considers
geminiApi.topPPrompt: Controls the probability threshold for model sampling

claudeApi.maxTokensPrompt: Maximum number of tokens to generate

doubao.name: Doubao
doubao.modelIdPrompt: Get from Volcengine console after creating inference endpoint, format: ep-xxx
doubao.baseUrlPrompt: Volcengine Doubao API URL, default: https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3

qwenApi.name: Qwen API
qwenApi.baseUrlPrompt: Alibaba Cloud Bailian API URL, default: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1

pi.name: Pi
pi.waitPiIntro: Please click the chatbot website link below and wait for the Pi introduction to finish, then close the window.

falcon.name: Falcon
falcon.temperaturePrompt: Higher values produce more diverse output
falcon.maxNewTokensPrompt: Maximum number of new tokens to generate
falcon.topPPrompt: Controls the probability threshold for model sampling
falcon.repetitionPenaltyPrompt: Penalty value for controlling text repetition

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.refreshCyclePrompt: Cycle for refreshing ChatGPT login status

info.title: About ChatALL
info.description: Concurrently chat with multiple AI bots to discover the best answers
info.disclaimerContent: ChatALL will not upload your conversations to any server. All chat history, settings, and login data are stored locally on your computer.

login.loginTip: Click the login button to login in a new window
login.logoutTip: Click the logout button to clear login status

confirm.reset: Are you sure you want to reset?
confirm.resetHint: This action will delete all chat history and settings
confirm.clear: Are you sure you want to clear?
confirm.clearHint: This action will clear all selected responses
